because.text: Adjudicated: both tool P0s real and fixed (fail-open sig counting without 'cryptography'; UNGOVERNED exit-0 let a deleted .warrants/ green CI -> status --enforce). In-tree trust anchor attack accepted - trust config is now a versioned OUT-OF-BAND blob and the tool refuses paths inside the verified tree (GOV-001 genesis.json lesson applied to ourselves). Threshold-injection hijack confirmed (1-of-1 minted pair self-authorized) - closed by lineage+pin+cardinality, converged blind with GPT-5/DeepSeek. Genesis keys cannot be s5.1-revoked (not rotation-born): roster change = bundled policy rotation, pinned in ADR. Ask-2 'no embedded root needed' OVERRULED 2:1. Placement GOV-doc ADOPTED 2:1 (self-reference paradox decisive). Key-state-refusal blast radius narrowed to governance-scoped warrants; full derivation stays the warrant CLI's job.

subject.note: Gemini 3.1 Pro ADR-007 gate review 1/3 (blind): revise
